description:
Sikkim — one of the most beautiful states in Northeast India — is home to charming Himalayan villages like Lachen and Lachung.
The deeper you travel, the more surreal it gets — from Gurudongmar Lake, one of the highest in India, to the stunning open landscapes of Yumthang and Thangu Valley.
And if you keep going, you’ll reach the edge of the road... Zero Point. Come let's explore this beautiful side of Northeast India with me.
